description: Heywood Phase 1 — Master list of qualifications required to instruct specific TBS events. Reference table — no PII. Linked by QualificationRecords to individual instructors.

columns.name: IssuingAuthority
columns.description: Organization that certifies this qualification (e.g., 'WTBN Quantico', 'TECOM', 'Red Cross')

columns.name: ValidityMonths
columns.description: How many months the qualification remains valid before requiring renewal

columns.name: RenewalProcess
columns.description: Steps required to renew (course, exam, practical, etc.)

columns.name: RequiredForEvents
columns.description: Comma-separated EventCodes from TrainingSchedule that require this qualification

columns.name: MinimumPerEvent
columns.description: Minimum number of qualified personnel needed per event instance

columns.name: OrderReference
columns.description: MCO, NAVMC, SOP, or other order requiring this qualification

views.name: All Active Qualifications
views.description: Master list of all current qualifications

views.name: By Category
views.description: Qualifications grouped by category for planning
